svg.text: • 78. Subsets — for each index, include or skip
• 90. Subsets II — sort, skip duplicates at same depth
• 47. Permutations II — sort, skip same value at same depth
• 39. Combination Sum — reuse allowed, idx parameter prevents duplicates
• 40. Combination Sum II — no reuse, sort, skip duplicates
• 51 / 52. N-Queens — column / diagonal sets, backtrack on conflict
• 37. Sudoku Solver — try 1..9, prune by row / col / box
• 79. Word Search — DFS on grid with visited mark, undo on return
• 17. Letter Combinations of a Phone Number — depth = length
• 131. Palindrome Partitioning — split index, recurse on rest
Backtracking is the right answer when n ≤ ~20 and choices branch.
